title: AhfuLife 100/200pcs Different World Flags Toothpick, Different Nations Cupcake Stick Flags for Sandwich Cupcake Toppers Fruit Tableware National Day World Cup Party Supplies Pub Royal Event Decor
features: [WHAT WILL YOU GET]: This pack contains 100/200pcs mixed cocktail stick flags. The perfect highlight decoration for sandwiches, cupcakes, fruit, cocktail and any snacks. Add a more patriotic atmosphere to your festivals and parties.
[TOOTHPICK FLAG SIZE]: The size of toothpick flag is 3.5 x 2.5 cm/ 1.38 x 0.98 inch, toothpick length is 6.5 cm/ 2.56 inch. Ideal for national celebrations decoration.

[MATERIAL]: These mixed toothpick flags are made of high-quality paper, the national flags are vividly printed on both sides of the thick paper, and the toothpicks are made of 100% solid wood material, eco-friendly and non-toxic.
[WIDE APPLICATION]: This mixed cocktail stick flag is applicable for many occasions, such as European Euros Cup, National Patriotic Activities, Home Garden Decorations and so on.

[DECORATE YOUR DINNER PARTY]: Our toothpick flag makes the food unique and easy to identify, a good helper for you. They are the perfect label for deli boards and cheese platters, and add a lot of fun as a food label for buffets.
